# megatron-core==0.16.1 dropped from the Bazel-side resolution: it ships
# as an sdist whose setup.py shells out to `python3 -m pybind11 --includes`
# inside an isolated build env where pybind11 isn't available, so the
# wheel build fails. The inference code paths the transcribe_cli tests
# exercise don't reach megatron, so this is safe to omit here. uv still
# pulls it for the dev venv (where setup.py finds pybind11 via the
# project's own deps).
